mapper.insert: merge into synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO a using (select #{item.tableId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} as tableId, #{item.tableName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} as tableName, #{item.storeType, jdbcType = INTEGER} as storeType, #{item.projectName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} as projectName, #{item.dataId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} as dataid from dual) b on (upper(a.TABLEID) = upper(b.tableId) and a.STORE_TYPE = b.storeType and upper(a.TABLENAME) = upper(b.tableName) and upper(a.PROJECT_NAME) = upper(b.projectName) and upper(a.dataid) = upper(b.dataid)) when matched then update set TABLE_MOD_TIME = to_date(#{item.tableModTime, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') when not matched then insert (TABLEID, TABLENAME, OBJECTNAME, STORE_TYPE, PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_NAME_CN, MEMO, CREATER, CREATER_ID, TABLE_CREATE_TIME, TABLE_MOD_TIME, IMPORT_FLAG, DATAID, TABLEINFOID, ISPARTITION, SEARCHFLAG) values (#{item.tableId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.tableName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.objectName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.storeType, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{item.projectName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.projectNameCh, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.memo, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.creater, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.createrId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, to_date(#{item.tableCreateTime, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), to_date(#{item.tableModTime, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), #{item.importFlag, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{item.dataId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.tableInfoId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.isPartition, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{item.searchFlag, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select distinct TABLEINFOID from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME) = upper(#{projectName}) and DATAID = #{dataId} and rownum = 1
select distinct TABLEINFOID from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId}) and DATAID = #{dataId} and rownum = 1

select o.TABLEINFOID as tableInfoId, o2.objectname as objectName, o2.tableName as tableName, o.TABLEID as tableId, o2.SJZZYJFLVALLUE as organizationClassificationId, o.store_type as storeType, PROJECT_NAME as projectName, o.import_flag as importFlag, o.partitiontype as partitionType, o.lifecycle as lifeCycle, o2.tablename as standTableName, v.CENTER_NAME as centerName, v.res_name as resName, v.res_id as resId, o.TABLENAME as realTableName, case when n.REGISTERCOUNT is null then 0 else n.REGISTERCOUNT end as registerCount, TABLE_CREATE_TIME as tableCreateTime, o.CREATER as creater from SYNLTE.OBJECT_STORE_INFO o left join (select ds.RES_ID, ds.RES_NAME, dc.CENTER_NAME from SYNDG.DS_DATA_RESOURCE ds left join syndg.ds_data_center dc on ds.CENTER_ID = dc.CENTER_ID) v on o.dataid = v.RES_ID left join (select TABLEINFOID, count(TABLEINFOID) as REGISTERCOUNT from synlte.public_data_info group by TABLEINFOID) n on o.TABLEINFOID = n.TABLEINFOID left join synlte.object o2 on o2.tableid = o.tableid
(upper(o.OBJECTNAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))
(upper(o2.tablename) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))
(upper(o.TABLEID) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))
(upper(o.TABLENAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))
(upper(o.OBJECTNAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(o2.tablename) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(o.TABLEID) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(o.TABLENAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))
and o.store_type in (
select #{item} from dual
)
and v.res_id in (
select #{item} from dual
)
and PROJECT_NAME in (
select #{item} from dual
)
and O.CREATER in (
select #{item} from dual
)
order by ${sort} ${sortOrder}

select value, label from (select distinct to_char(store_type) as value, 'storeType' as label from synlte.object_store_info where store_type is not null order by to_char(store_type) asc) union all select value, label from (select distinct project_name as value, 'projectName' as label from synlte.object_store_info where project_name is not null order by project_name asc) union all select value, label from (select distinct CREATER as VALUE, 'CREATER' as label from synlte.object_store_info where CREATER is not null order by CREATER asc) union all select value, label from (select distinct dataid as value, 'dataid' as label from synlte.object_store_info where dataid is not null order by dataid asc)
mapper.update:
update synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO set TABLEID = #{item.tableId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OBJECTNAME = #{item.objectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPORT_FLAG = #{item.importFlag, jdbcType=INTEGER}, ISPARTITION = #{item.isPartition, jdbcType=INTEGER},
PARTITIONTYPE = #{item.partitionType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
PARTITIONCOUNT = #{item.partitionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LIFECYCLE = #{item.lifeCycle, jdbcType=INTEGER}, TABLE_MOD_TIME = sysdate where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{item.tableName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME) = upper(#{item.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(DATAID) = upper(#{item.dataId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLEINFOID) = upper(#{item.tableInfoId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select TABLEID from synlte.object_store_info where dataid in (select res_id from ds_data_resource)
